title: Howling Beast Mod W.I.P
description: Adds Horror Creature Called Howling Beast
body:
# Warning!!! this mod contains loud sounds and jumpscares, you play at your own risk.

This mod adds horror creature called the Howling Beast. The Howling Beast Spawns only in night and overworld.

![Player Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a178620a5c0afcc7b9810592052abe255a58f1d5.png)

(btw he is 5 times bigger than the player)

He can:
- Break Block in dome shape with size 16x16 blocks
- Chase you when you get to close to him
- Make a sound when he spawns
- Make jumpscare when your health is low
- also he has a drops when killed

### This mod requaries [Mino's Particle Presets](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minos-particle-presets)

Credits: sounds are taken from cave crawler mod made by Flamc04 (The mod doesn't exist anymore), model is the edited version of Enhanced Cave Noise.jar made by Schpalrbo ([Download link](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/enhanced-cave-noise-jar))

If you want to contact with me or report bugs check out planet minecraft site of mod
[https://www.planetminecraft.com/mod/howling-beast-mod/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/mod/howling-beast-mod/)
